title: linum milletii subsp. appressum
intro: Linum milletii subsp. appressum, also known as annual flax or Mexican flax, is a subspecies of the Linum family, specifically a flowering plant with annual or short-lived perennial habits. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving skin and hair health, and supporting digestive and cardiovascular well-being. The plant can be prepared as an herbal supplement, tea, or oil, often used topically or internally to harness its potential health benefits.
